text:
The Wall was functional to delay invasion, but since there are missiles, became something like the Egyptian Pyramid, sighting seeing..

Foundation of the Wall is said to have children buried under it, the bricks used by insitu mixing earth, and, the joining technique used no reinforcement, using blood mixed with sticky rice..the joints formed are strong, no collisions, the technique is unique, better than any even today!
